expectations.text: The output identifies insufficient token permissions or wrong project/dataset token as likely 403 causes.
expectations.evidence: Report identifies too-limited role, wrong project token, or dataset/document-type permissions as likely causes.

expectations.text: The output recommends the lowest sufficient write-capable role and keeping write tokens server-side.
expectations.evidence: Report recommends dedicated server-side token with lowest write-capable role and never NEXT_PUBLIC.

expectations.text: The output suggests checking env loading without printing secret values.
expectations.evidence: Report suggests env-check and says no token value was printed or saved.
